title: “Connecting dots” Journalist defends Candace Owens amid Bride of Charlie controversy, claims Charlie Kirk mystery will be solved
summary_full: Journalist Elizabeth Lane publicly backed Candace Owens after the release of the fourth Bride of Charlie episode. Owens continues to question the circumstances around Charlie Kirk’s death and has made claims about Erika Kirk’s upbringing. Lane believes the case will be solved. No new official updates have been announced by authorities regarding the investigation.
